---
title: "RentSignal Blog"
subtitle: "Data-driven insights on the German rental market"
listing:
  id: blog-listing
  contents: posts/*/index.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [image, title, categories, description, author, date]
  grid-item-border: true
  image-height: "200px"
page-layout: full
---

::: {#blog-listing}
:::
